steps.title: Background
steps.prompt: Briefly describe your professional background and the kind of role you are pursuing.

steps.title: Experience
steps.prompt: What is the most relevant experience you bring to this position, and why does it matter?

steps.title: Strengths
steps.prompt: Which skills or strengths best equip you to succeed in this role?

steps.title: Challenge
steps.prompt: Describe a difficult problem you faced at work and how you addressed it.

steps.title: Motivation
steps.prompt: Why are you interested in this opportunity, and what do you hope to contribute?

video.title: Introduction video
video.instructions: Record a short introduction of up to two minutes. Speak clearly; you may describe your aims and what you would bring to the role.
